name: Clearwater Paper Corp
business: Clearwater Paper is a manufacturer and supplier of Solid Bleached Sulfate (SBS) paperboard packaging products, serving independent converters in North America. It also sells minor amounts of pulp to outside customers. The paperboard is used in folding carton and food service applications.

exposures.sentence: We believe we are strategically positioned to benefit from the increasing emphasis on sustainability within the industry.
Climate change is an important issue to the public, governmental authorities and various other stakeholders, and is a priority for our business.
We use a variety of chemicals in our manufacturing processes, including petroleum-based polyethylene and certain petroleum-based latex chemicals.
Generate renewable fuel from organic residual wood fiber to produce steam and electricity, reducing reliance on external energy sources at our mills.
Freight is a significant cost input for our business.
Our business and financial performance may be harmed by future labor disruptions.

catalysts.sentence: We intend to execute our Lewiston, Idaho planned major maintenance outage in June of 2026, and the Augusta, Georgia outage in October of 2026.
We intend to execute our Lewiston, Idaho planned major maintenance outage in June of 2026, and the Augusta, Georgia outage in October of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The North American paperboard market encompasses approximately 10 million tons
tamClaims.sentence: We participate in the North American paperboard market, which encompasses approximately 10 million tons and is divided into three principal substrates.
